name: Hawaiian Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 20 ounce Can of crushed pineapple, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Divide the mixture evenly among four greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pans.
3. Cover tightly with foil or plastic wrap.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
5. Remove the covers and bake for an additional 20-30 minutes, until heated through and slightly browned on top.
